redherb-sidebar:
Heading shown above the RedHerb section in the wiki sidebar.
{{Identical|RedHerb}}
redherb-sidebar-create-child-company: Text of the sidebar link that opens a dialog for creating a child Subject with the Company schema.
redherb-sidebar-subject-finder: Text of the sidebar link that opens the RedHerb subject finder.
redherb-subject-finder-schema-label:
Label of the schema name input on Special:RedHerbSubjectFinder.
{{Identical|Schema}}
redherb-subject-finder-schema-placeholde: Placeholder text inside the schema name input on Special:RedHerbSubjectFinder.
redherb-subject-finder-pick-subject: Label of the subject lookup on Special:RedHerbSubjectFinder.
redherb-create-child-dialog-title: Title of the RedHerb dialog that creates a child Company subject.
redherb-create-child-dialog-label:
Label of the subject label input in the RedHerb create-child-Company dialog.
{{Identical|Label}}
redherb-create-child-dialog-save:
Label of the save button in the RedHerb create-child-Company dialog.
{{Identical|Create}}
redherb-create-child-dialog-cancel:
Label of the cancel button in the RedHerb create-child-Company dialog.
{{Identical|Cancel}}
redherb-create-child-error: Error notification shown when the RedHerb create-child-Company save fails.
redherb-create-child-success: Confirmation shown after successfully creating a child Company subject via the RedHerb dialog.
redherb-sidebar-edit-main-subject: Text of the sidebar link that opens a dialog for editing the page's main Subject.
redherb-edit-main-subject-dialog-title: Title of the RedHerb dialog that edits the page's main Subject.
redherb-edit-main-subject-dialog-label:
Label of the subject label input in the RedHerb edit-main-subject dialog.
{{Identical|Label}}
redherb-edit-main-subject-dialog-save:
Label of the save button in the RedHerb edit-main-subject dialog.
{{Identical|Save}}
redherb-edit-main-subject-dialog-cancel:
Label of the cancel button in the RedHerb edit-main-subject dialog.
{{Identical|Cancel}}
redherb-edit-main-subject-no-main: Warning shown when triggering the RedHerb edit-main-subject action on a page that does not have a main subject.
redherb-edit-main-subject-success: Confirmation shown after successfully updating the main Subject via the RedHerb dialog.
